overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing movement from a canal onto a waterfront promenade in Los Santos, passing modern commercial buildings and a skate park before approaching the Maze Bank Arena stadium on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront canal with commercial buildings on shore

events.description: camera transitions from water surface onto concrete shoreline

agents.ego_description: moving across water surface toward the city shoreline with buildings ahead

entered.detail: large beige commercial building with Daily Globe signage and multiple stories
calm water surface reflecting the surrounding buildings
white concrete skateboard ramps and bowls along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on the water surface of a canal, moving toward the shore of an urban area. The Daily Globe building dominates the left side while a skate park is visible in the distance on the right. The water is calm and the sky is clear blue.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete waterfront promenade with adjacent skate park

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete promenade parallel to the water's edge

entered.detail: multi-story yellow residential building with balconies and ground-floor garages

segments.scene_description: Moving along the wide concrete promenade, the camera passes the Daily Globe building on the left while the skate park ramps remain visible on the right. The path is empty of pedestrians, with modern apartment buildings lining the left side as the camera progresses forward.

events.description: path curves left into a tree-lined area with denser vegetation and shade

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded path toward the large stadium structure visible ahead

entered.detail: dense cluster of green deciduous trees providing shade along the path
large stadium with distinctive curved metallic roof structure

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a tree-lined path with moderate vegetation on the right. The Maze Bank Arena stadium becomes visible in the distance ahead, while the skate park and earlier buildings fall behind. The path curves slightly left through the shaded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium plaza with cylindrical industrial buildings

events.description: camera passes close to the cylindrical metal building on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the large cylindrical stadium structures in the plaza

entered.detail: round industrial building with corrugated metal siding and beige trim
modern building with multicolored panel facade in rainbow colors

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the open plaza area immediately surrounding the stadium complex, passing a large cylindrical warehouse building on the right. The Maze Bank Arena dominates the view ahead with its massive curved roof, while a colorful modern office building appears on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the calm waters of an urban canal onto a wide waterfront promenade that leads toward a massive stadium complex. It begins on the water's surface, gliding toward the shore with the Daily Globe building on the left and a distant skate park on the right under a clear blue sky. As the camera transitions onto the concrete promenade, it passes modern apartment buildings and the skate park ramps before the environment shifts into a shaded, tree-lined path. The scene then opens up as the path curves, leaving the earlier buildings behind to reveal the Maze Bank Arena in the distance. Finally, the camera moves through an open plaza, passing a large cylindrical warehouse and a colorful office building before the stadium's massive curved roof dominates the view.
